baslik.alt: Porch → Mudroom Conversion · Orange (84100), Vaucluse, France · Rev B · July 2026
cizim.k1d: Landing + K1 + V + mudroom plan, door swings and swing rationale (1:40)
cizim.k3d: Bench 1600 (2 drawers, 6 hooks, 3 niches + LED) + M1 mirror unit + shoe tower
cizim.k5d: Hinge/runner/pull/foot schedule and fitting notes (Rev B counts)
cizim.not: Rule on every sheet: site measurement before fabrication is mandatory — never fabricate from plan dimensions.
dok.not: Note: the tender/commercial file is not published on this portal; it goes to firms by e-mail.
durum.alt: Work completed so far — oldest first, updates automatically.
fazlar: 6 measurements + photos; the Déclaration Préalable file is prepared — buffer door K1 goes into the same file.
Deliver to the town hall; the yellow site notice goes up and is photographed.
Standard 1 month; 2 in a protected zone (ABF architect approval). Silence = approval. NO ordering.
Neighbours' 2-month appeal window passes; meanwhile quotes are collected and choices made.
Footings → walls → floor raise → roof junction → electrical conduits (3–4 weeks).
Laser survey; the furniture cut list is finalised; ordering happens only now.
Insulation, plasterboard, tiles, paint; furniture install + LED hookup.
DAACT (completion declaration) + insurance notice. The room is in use.
footer: Preliminary design — no fabrication before site measurement and Déclaration Préalable approval.
model.disDurum: Exterior: use "Before / After" to compare the open bay with the new wall. Click the glazed buffer door K1 at the stair head. (The stair is indicative — 9 risers, to be verified on site.)
model.durum0: The landing: the existing HOUSE door, the cellar door and mudroom door V surround this small hall; glazed K1 is the outer door to the stair. Click the doors — V opens into the mudroom, K1 onto the landing; neither swings over the stair. Click the orange spheres to drop to that spot for a 360° look-around.
model.k1Acik: K1 opened INTO the landing — never over the stair: opening outward would strike whoever is climbing (fall risk). The glazed leaf shows who is coming; the door turns the landing into a heat buffer.
model.k1Kapali: K1 closed: the stair head is safe, the landing wind-proof. Click to watch it open.
model.oncem: BEFORE — open bay: waste bins, barred window at the back. This facade + K1 is the only change seen from outside.
model.panoBitti: Back to the normal view. Click an orange sphere for a 360° look-around.
model.pano_k1giris: 360° — at the K1 ENTRY point: looking through the glazed door into the landing; the stair is behind you. Drag to look around; "Exit" or ESC to return.
model.pano_sahanlik: 360° — you are on the LANDING: cellar door left, door V ahead, glazed K1 right. Drag to look around; "Exit" or ESC to return.
model.pano_vestiyer: 360° — centre of the MUDROOM: W1 wardrobe west, bench + coat wall east, mirror (M1) north. Drag to look around; "Exit" or ESC to return.
model.presetAyna: Door→mirror axis: entering through V you face the mirror.
model.presetK1: Landing view: HOUSE door, V and glazed K1 together. Click any door.
model.presetKus: Bird's eye: landing and mudroom at a glance — W1, bench, shoe tower and the M1 mirror unit.
model.sonra: AFTER — the bay is closed: rendered wall, high glazing band, vents; entry is now through K1 at the stair head. (Stair indicative — 9 risers, to be verified on site.)
model.vAcik: Door V opened INTO the mudroom (hinged on the east jamb) — you see the mirror straight ahead; the open leaf parks on the east side, keeping the entry axis and the wardrobe clear.
model.vKapali: Door V closed. Click again to watch it open.
offline.cadNot: CAD files (DXF, mm, 1:1, R2010) can be downloaded from the same address.
offline.pdfNot: PDFs are not embedded in this file — the links below open/download them from the live portal (internet required).
ozet.alt: The covered bay beside the stair becomes a landing plus an insulated mudroom. This page shows where we are and the next step.
ozet.cap1: Rev B plan — landing, K1, door V and the mirror straight ahead
ozet.cap2: New circulation — one stair, K1 buffer door, facing doors
ozet.cap3: Threshold detail — 20 mm step-free, gasketed, with drip
ozet.kurallar:
· Site measurement before fabrication is mandatory
· Doors open INWARD — never over the stair
· No construction before town-hall approval
ozet.nasil: How to use: click the doors in the 3D Model (V opens into the mudroom, K1 onto the landing) · tick finished steps in Process — “Next step” updates itself.
ozetDin.baslamadi: Design done; site steps not started yet.
ozetDin.kalanYok: Nothing left. Keep the DAACT and insurance notices safe.
ozetDin.tamamHepsi: All steps complete — the room is in use!
render.alt: For each view: the 3D model on the left, an AI-generated photoreal interpretation on the right.
render.k_ic_k1: Landing — view from the K1 entry
render.not: Photoreal images are illustrative — dimensions and fabrication authority rest with the drawings.
render.yok: The photoreal gallery has not been generated yet.
surec.alt: Tick the boxes to record progress (stored in this browser). Source: Owner's Guide, page 2.
svg.aynaKarsi: MIRROR — straight ahead of the door
svg.sira2: left HOUSE · right V → MUDROOM → mirror
